header.title: INFORMATION QUESTIONNAIRE
header.subtitle: The best productions happen when we're aligned from day one. Fill out this short form so we can propose the best solution for you.

sections.title: 1. TOPIC AND CATEGORY (What are we doing?)
sections.description: Choose the category that best describes your project. This helps us determine the nature of the work on set.

sections.title: 2. GOAL AND DISTRIBUTION (Why and for whom are we doing this?)
sections.description: Understanding where the video will 'live' lets us plan the right formats.

questions.label: What is the main goal of this piece?
questions.placeholder: e.g., increasing B2B sales, lead generation, building brand trust

questions.label: Who is the end audience?
questions.placeholder: e.g., purchasing directors, small business owners, IT specialists

questions.label: Where will your clients most often watch this video?
questions.placeholder: e.g., website homepage, LinkedIn/Meta ads, trade shows

sections.title: 3. VISION AND SCALE (What should it look like?)
sections.description: Here we define whether we need a studio, actors, or an authentic approach.

questions.label: What do we need to physically show in frame?
questions.placeholder: e.g., product in use, client service process, CEO statement

questions.label: Any reference videos you love? (Paste links)
questions.placeholder: Paste 1-2 links and tell us what you like about them

questions.label: Who will be on camera?
questions.placeholder: e.g., our team, happy clients, hired actors, or just a voiceover?

sections.title: 4. COLLABORATION MODEL AND BUDGET (Realistic scope)
sections.description: Budget scale determines crew size and post-production time.

questions.label: When does the finished piece need to go live?

options.label: One-off project. Our budget range is:
Ongoing partnership. We're looking for a long-term video partner.
We need guidance. We're not sure what will work—please propose options and pricing.

questions.label: Is there anything else we should know?
